source.description: A reviewed six-panel felt-tip marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free chess knight in a bold profile on warm paper, with no lettering, board, other pieces, hands, crown, sticker outline, badge frame, logo, or decorative border.

process_strategy: The sequence locks one horse-head arc, muzzle wedge, neck sweep, and stacked pedestal; wraps a chunky chess-piece silhouette around the guides; adds the carved mane, ear, base bands, and abstract facial notches without a cartoon expression; introduces motion accents and shadow; then inks and colors every established shape before final cleanup only.

final_elements.name: horse-head arc, muzzle wedge, neck sweep, center axis, and stacked pedestal guides
final_elements.description: Light construction fixes one upright profile with a curved head and neck above a centered chess-piece base.

final_elements.name: chess-knight silhouette with pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal
final_elements.description: A chunky continuous contour turns the guides into an immediately readable knight chess piece.

final_elements.name: carved mane notch, three mane blocks, brow cut, nostril groove, inner neck contour, and two base bands
final_elements.description: Three chunky mane blocks, simple carved marks, and pedestal bands give the piece structure without adding eyeballs, a smile, or a character face.

final_elements.name: short mane hatch marks, two spark accents, and oval ground shadow
final_elements.description: Short hatch marks across the three established mane blocks, two small energy sparks, and a shallow shadow add playful rhythm around the silhouette.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with turquoise, raspberry, yellow, and violet marker fills
final_elements.description: Visible felt-tip texture separates the knight body, mane, base bands, accents, and shadow while keeping handmade edges.

frames.visible_job: Places the horse-head arc, muzzle wedge, neck sweep, center axis, and stacked pedestal at one fixed scale.
introduces: horse-head arc, muzzle wedge, neck sweep, center axis, and stacked pedestal guides

frames.visible_job: Wraps the guides with the pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal in one bold profile.
introduces: chess-knight silhouette with pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal
requires_prior_elements: horse-head arc, muzzle wedge, neck sweep, center axis, and stacked pedestal guides

frames.visible_job: Adds the mane notch, three chunky mane blocks, brow cut, nostril groove, inner neck contour, and two base bands without turning the piece into a smiling character.
introduces: carved mane notch, three mane blocks, brow cut, nostril groove, inner neck contour, and two base bands
requires_prior_elements: chess-knight silhouette with pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal

frames.visible_job: Adds short hatch marks across the three established mane blocks, two small spark accents, and an oval ground shadow around the completed knight form.
introduces: short mane hatch marks, two spark accents, and oval ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: chess-knight silhouette with pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal
carved mane notch, three mane blocks, brow cut, nostril groove, inner neck contour, and two base bands

frames.visible_job: Thickens every established contour and fills the body, mane, base bands, sparks, and shadow with directional marker strokes and visible highlight gaps.
introduces: thick black outline with turquoise, raspberry, yellow, and violet marker fills
requires_prior_elements: chess-knight silhouette with pointed ear, blocky muzzle, arched neck, and wide pedestal
carved mane notch, three mane blocks, brow cut, nostril groove, inner neck contour, and two base bands
short mane hatch marks, two spark accents, and oval ground shadow

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens the established knight contours, carved details, mane blocks and hatch marks, pedestal bands, sparks, marker fills, highlight gaps, and ground shadow.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established colored shapes

rejection_checks: No head contour, muzzle, ear, neck, pedestal, carved mark, mane block, hatch mark, base band, spark, color area, or shadow may first appear in the final panel.
The knight must retain one bold profile, head angle, neck curve, base width, scale, and crop across every frame.
Keep the chess piece face-free: no eyeball, pupil, smile, teeth, tongue, cheek marks, or cartoon expression.
Reject lettering, chessboards, other pieces, hands, crowns, logos, sticker outlines, badge frames, or decorative borders.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, poster lighting, mechanically perfect symmetry, or clean 3D-rendered plastic.
